channel.title: NUZU News
channel.description: NUZU: Real News in Real Time. Breaking headlines from 200+ trusted sources.

CORRECTS: China says its economy grew 4.3% in the last quarter from a year earlier, slowing from 5% in Jan-March - KING5.com
